name: Millennium Hotel Rotorua
description: 位于罗托鲁瓦市中心湖畔，毗邻波利尼西亚温泉。227间空调客房，大理石浴室，现代装饰，利用酒店自有地热资源供暖。Poolside Brasserie提供早午餐，Nikau餐厅提供晚餐，Bar Zazu每日中午营业至深夜。酒店内设Spa按摩和身体护理、恒温泳池、温泉池和健身房。免费停车，配备3个电动汽车充电站。接受支付宝和微信支付。
descriptionEn: Centrally located beside Lake Rotorua, adjacent to Polynesian Spa. 227 air-conditioned rooms with marble bathrooms and modern décor, heated by geothermal resource. Features Poolside Brasserie, Restaurant Nikau, Bar Zazu, Spa, heated swimming pool, hot pools, and gym. Free parking with 3 EV charging stations. Alipay and WePay accepted.
highlights: 湖畔位置，毗邻波利尼西亚温泉
自有地热供暖+温泉池+按摩Spa
接受支付宝和微信支付
address: Cnr Eruera and Hinemaru Streets, Rotorua
addressEn: Cnr Eruera and Hinemaru Streets, Rotorua
